import subprocess
import sys

result = subprocess.run(
    [sys.executable, '/a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat.py'],
    capture_output=True,
    text=True
)

print('STDOUT:')
print(result.stdout)
print('\nSTDERR:')
print(result.stderr)
print(f'\nReturn code: {result.returncode}')
